
.pixel-panel-css {
  border-style: solid;
  border-width: 24px;
  border-image-source: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,");
  border-image-slice: 12;
  border-image-repeat: stretch;
  image-rendering: pixelated;
}

.pixel-panel-css-sm {
  border-style: solid;
  border-width: 18px;
  border-image-source: url("data:image/svg+xml;base64,");
  border-image-slice: 12;
  border-image-repeat: stretch;
  image-rendering: pixelated;
}
